description: This table lists information related to "Weird Al" Yankovic, including years, titles of works, and associated roles. The sample data references a 1988 film titled 'Tapeheads'.

This table lists "Weird Al" Yankovic's roles in TV shows and films, including the year, title of the production, his role, and additional notes. It covers his career spanning from the 1970s to the 2000s.
This table lists "Weird Al" Yankovic's roles in various projects over the years, including the year, title of the project, and additional notes.

This table lists members of the 14th Parliament of British Columbia, their associated electoral districts, and their political parties. It provides a snapshot of the political composition of the legislature during that period.

This table lists participants of the 1898 International Cross Country Championships, including their rank, athlete name, nationality, and race time. It provides results for athletes such as Sidney Robinson, detailing their performance and country of origin.
This table lists results from the 1913 International Cross Country Championships, including athlete rankings, names, nationalities, and race times.

This table lists the results of the 1920 International Cross Country Championships, including athlete rankings, names, nationalities, and race times. Sample data highlights Scottish athlete Jim Wilson.

This table lists films from 1954 with details on their international market, revenue, admissions, and production countries. It includes information on the studios involved and the financial performance of each film.
This table lists musical compositions from 1955, including details such as the composer, composition title, date, location, and performers involved.

This table lists films from 1957, including their country of origin, title, director, studio, revenue, and admissions data. It provides information on the financial and cultural impact of films released that year.
This table lists musical compositions and related details from 1964, including composers, works, performance dates, locations, and performers.

This table lists country music singles from 1970 along with their chart positions in the United States (US) and Canada (CAN), and the corresponding artists. It provides a snapshot of the top songs and their rankings during that year.

This table lists 40 films from 1974 with their rankings, titles, production studios, and domestic box office earnings. It includes notable entries like 'Blazing Saddles' and provides financial data alongside studio information.

This table lists members of the 1st New Zealand Parliament along with their electorates, provinces, and election dates. It provides historical data on the initial parliamentary representation in New Zealand.
This table lists the 2009 Salford City Reds rugby league team's players, including their jersey numbers, positions on the field, and their previous clubs before joining the team.
This table provides information on the Kansas City Chiefs' 2010 season, listing players' positions, their status, and the teams they were associated with in 2009 and 2010.
This table tracks the 2011 Kansas City Chiefs season roster, listing players' positions, their status, and team affiliations in 2010 and 2011.
This table lists members of the 28th Legislative Assembly of British Columbia, their electoral districts, and political parties. It represents data from the 1966-1972 parliamentary term.
This table lists historical figures in RNA biology, including their names, dates of birth or significant events, and notable awards they have received.

This table lists 80 New World monkey species, including their scientific and common names, taxonomic classification, and conservation status. It provides data for scientific research on biodiversity and species preservation.

The table lists New World monkey species with their scientific and common names, classification status, average sizes, and conservation statuses. It provides taxonomic and ecological information for 100 species.

This table records results from 10,000 metres track and field events, including the year of the event, race time, athlete name, and competition location. It contains 80 rows of historical race data with associated metadata.
This table records results from 10,000 metres athletic events, including the year of the event, race time, athlete name, and competition location.

This table records instances of the 10-second barrier in the 100m sprint being broken, including the date it was first broken, the athlete's name, their nationality, and the number of times the record was broken.
This table records results from the 100 metres hurdles event, including the year each race occurred, the athletes' times, the athletes' names, and the competition locations.
This table lists members of the 100th Wisconsin Legislature, including their district, representative name, political party, current age, residence, and the year they were first elected.

This table documents changes in congressional representation during the 102nd United States Congress, including the district affected, the vacator, reason for the change, successor, and installation date.

This table records changes in U.S. congressional representation during the 105th Congress, including the district affected, the vacating representative, the reason for the change, their successor, and the installation date.

This table lists changes in representation during the 107th United States Congress, including congressional districts, vacators, reasons for seat changes, successors, and installation dates. It documents 60 instances of vacancies and replacements, with details on the districts affected and the formal installation dates of successors.
This table lists members of the 10th Manitoba Legislature, their electoral districts, and their political parties. It provides information on the Legislative Assembly of Manitoba from 1899 to 1914.

This table lists members of the 10th Manitoba Legislature, including their electoral districts, affiliations, and election details. It provides information on who was elected, their political alignment, and contextual details about the election process.
The table lists changes in U.S. Senate seats during the 10th Congress, including the state, the vacating senator, the reason for the change, the successor, and the installation date.

This table documents changes in representation during the 10th United States Congress, including congressional districts affected, individuals who vacated seats, reasons for the changes, successors appointed, and dates of their formal installation.

This table records instances of vacancies and successors in the 11th United States Congress, detailing the district affected, the vacator, the reason for the change, the successor, and the date of the successor's formal installation.

This table records 1500 meters race results, including the year of the event, the athlete's time, the competitor's name, and the location where the race took place. It spans 80 entries with data from various years and locations.

This table records 1500 metres race results, including the year of the event, the recorded time, the athlete's name, and the location where the race took place. It contains 64 entries spanning multiple years with associated performance data.

This table tracks the progression of 1500 metres world records, listing the time achieved, the athlete who set the record, the date it was set, and the location. It provides a historical overview of improvements in this athletic event.

This table tracks the progression of 1500 metres world records over time, listing the recorded time, athlete name, date of achievement, and location. Each row represents a new record set by an athlete.

This table tracks the progression of the 1500 metres world record over time, listing the recorded time, athlete name, date of achievement, and location. It documents improvements in the record through historical data entries.
This table documents the progression of the 1500 metres world record, including the time achieved, the athlete who set the record, the date of the event, and the location where it occurred.
